headline: Cadence And NVIDIA Deepen AI Partnership As Valuation Stays Demanding
summary: Cadence Design Systems (NasdaqGS:CDNS) expanded its partnership with NVIDIA to accelerate agentic AI and digital twin solutions across semiconductor design and physical AI systems. The collaboration focuses on combining Cadence AI-driven design automation and simulation tools with NVIDIA AI infrastructure for use in chip design, physical AI systems, and AI factory digital twins.
